title: Declare typed component controls and operate Preview

claims.statement: The transitional Panel infers controls from interpolation paths and writes variables to a legacy shared channel without naming Preview or Program.
ElementNode is the current reusable visual contract and can carry component-owned control declarations through saved Scenes and runtime snapshots.
Preview and Program already have separate Show-scoped snapshots and revisions, while Take is the only implemented promotion command.
A server-derived control catalog and an expected-revision batch command can replace inferred variable access without introducing a second production state model.
Value controls for text, number, toggle, selection, and color cover the first contextual Production workflow; action controls require the later vendor-neutral Control API contract.
Action controls, direct-to-Program mode, device credentials, and Stream Deck adapters remain unimplemented and are not claimed by this change.

successCriteria.statement: Components may declare text, number, toggle, select, and color controls with stable identifiers, labels, safe variable paths, and type-specific constraints.
successCriteria.verification: Protocol type checks and JSON Schema validation tests.

successCriteria.statement: Scene preparation rejects duplicate identifiers, duplicate paths, unsafe paths, invalid constraints, and values that violate their declared control type.
A batch control command explicitly targets Show Preview, validates the expected Preview revision and operation identifier, applies all values atomically, and increments Preview once.
successCriteria.verification: State-machine and authenticated route tests for success, conflict, rejection, and idempotency.

successCriteria.statement: Applying Preview controls never changes Program or the persisted Scene; Program receives the prepared values only through Take.
successCriteria.verification: Runtime isolation tests compare Preview, Program, and saved source before and after control commands.

successCriteria.statement: Studio Production and the transitional Panel render only the server-derived declared catalog through one shared operator-control component and label the target as Preview.
successCriteria.verification: Shared UI unit tests and desktop/mobile browser inspection.

successCriteria.statement: Editor can add, edit, and remove typed control declarations on the selected visual component, and enabling component visibility creates an explicit toggle declaration.
successCriteria.verification: Editor type checks and browser authoring inspection.

definitionOfDone.statement: CHG-0009 references ADR-0004 and SPEC-0001 and its implemented record contains no blocking unknown.
The canonical protocol, server validation, Preview command, Studio, Panel, and Editor consume the declared control contract without variable inference.
definitionOfDone.evidence: protocol, server, shared/ui, studio, panel, and editor source

definitionOfDone.statement: Automated tests cover schema validation, atomic mutation, stale revisions, idempotency, source isolation, and generated operator UI behavior.
Desktop and mobile evidence shows a producer loading a Scene, adjusting declared Preview controls, and observing Program remain unchanged before Take.
definitionOfDone.evidence: Playwright screenshots and browser state inspection

definitionOfDone.statement: Governance, quality, test, build, and dependency audit suites pass for the final manifest.
definitionOfDone.evidence: npm run governance:check and npm run check and npm run build and npm audit

definitionOfDone.statement: The signed pull-request commit and GitHub observation are current for the final planHash and manifestHash.
